response.overview: File under: something we've never understood. Occasionally we'll run into some poor misguided soul that finds himself intimidated by the idea of a woman using a vibrator, or even her own fingers, to bring herself the pleasure she wants and deserves. That buzzing plastic toy isn't a replacement part for your penis, silly boy! Relax; none of these girls would ever consider giving up the cock, of course. As hard as it is to believe, sometimes there just isn't a cock around when they need one! These are the kind of women who just can't keep their hands off of themselves, which makes them the kind of women you want to be around!
